title: Agentic Review: story-view navigation and UI polish
description:
PR **#35110** replaces the bespoke review detail screen with normal story URLs (`?path=/story/...&collection=...`), keeps the summary mounted via a portal, and polishes the review UX with **agentic** theme colors, markdown descriptions, status icons on story tiles, and natural header wrapping.

Start with the **Full** summary (markdown description + collection grid), then open **On Reviewed Story** for the toolbar header on a real story view.

collections.title: Review summary screen
collections.rationale: The curated review summary with **agentic** markdown description, searchable collections, stale banner, and story tiles with change-status icons.

collections.title: Story toolbar header on reviewed stories
collections.rationale: The `TOOLBAR_HEADER` bar shown while reviewing a story — collection context, prev/next navigation, progress, and back-to-summary link.

collections.title: Collection grid and story links
collections.rationale: Thumbnail grid layout, overflow handling, and navigation into standard story URLs with a `collection` query param.

collections.title: Sidebar change-detection icons
collections.rationale: Sidebar status icons after this PR — **plus** for new stories and **agentic purple** for reviewing — plus the review CTA states.
